ops.body:
# getaway v2 architecture (final, post-review)

The bash-scripted v1 (getaway.sh + jq strings in plan-trip.js) is replaced by a Python CLI at `cli/` (uv project, flat layout). Invocation everywhere: `uv run --project "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cli" getaway ...` ŌĆö never `uvx --from` (wheel-caches by version, serves stale builds on plugin-cache updates). First call builds `cli/.venv`; skills warm it with `prefs status` at the main level.

## State model
- JSON docs are canonical: `~/.getaway/preferences.json` (durable identity), `trips/<slug>/trip.json` (per-trip memory + `plan` fan-out spec + `judgment` factor profile), `trips/current` plain-text pointer, `learnings.jsonl`. No version fields, no migrations, ever (ruling 1920b34).
- `cache.db` (SQLite, WAL) is DERIVED ONLY ŌĆö `user_version` mismatch delete-and-recreates; deleting it loses zero user intent. Bootstrap is serialized under the sidecar flock AND uses IF NOT EXISTS DDL (concurrent first-use race, repro'd 32-thread).
- All doc writes go through `paths.atomic_update`: exclusive flock on a persistent sidecar `<path>.lock` (never replaced/unlinked) held across read-merge-write, then tempfile+os.replace. Locking the target itself is WRONG ŌĆö os.replace swaps inodes and a concurrent locker on the orphaned inode loses updates (repro'd, fixed in P1).
- Trip-scoped cache queries use the LATEST sweep per (trip, label) ŌĆö a refreshed sweep's smaller result set wins; stale rows from older sweeps never resurface.

## Freshness / resume invariants
- Checkpoints live in `trips/<slug>/checkpoints.json`, keyed by phase ("sweep:<label>", "shortlist", "evidence.<factor>", "rank", ...). Fresh = inputs_fp matches + upstream_fp matches + TTL (constants.PHASE_TTL_HOURS, ":"-suffix stripped) not exceeded.
- Artifact dependencies are CLI-SIDE ONLY: `trips.PHASE_ARTIFACT_DEPS` is the single map (phase_check takes no dep args; absent-but-expected deps hash as an "absent" sentinel so their later appearance flips the phase stale). The workflow never passes dep lists.
- inputs_fp covers the trip's planning keys + the prefs keys planning consumes; balances/statuses/credits/status_goals enter ONLY for rank/finalize (a balance refresh must never invalidate sweeps). CLI stampers capture inputs_fp at WORK START and pass it to phase_done (concurrent-trip-edit race).
- `sweep run` self-skips on a fresh checkpoint with ZERO HTTP. Quota events from before the current UTC day report as reset (seats.aero resets at midnight UTC); `latest_quota` orders by recorded_at DESC then remaining ASC.
- Ranking currency (ruling 876a964 ┬¦2): band math and ordering use the bookable expanded mileage; the expand.json write contract: each record carries `mileage` = bookable int (rank fails loud without it) and `seats` = remaining for the cabin when the source reports it. Rank re-applies the two hard feasibility constraints (seats >= party, mileage <= ceiling) against expanded truth and writes `{"ranked": [...], "dropped": [...]}` ŌĆö CLI stdout stays the ranked list.
- Deterministic facts feed the SAME tier machinery as judgment verdicts at rank: affordability coveredŌåÆpromote / transfer-pathŌåÆneutral / unfundedŌåÆdemote; soft-avoidŌåÆdemote; status-earning + unexpired credit matchesŌåÆpromote when active. Tier discipline: primary orders within the 15% band, secondary breaks ties, note never reorders.

## Workflow contract (plan-trip.js)
- Args are minimal: `{project, slug, refresh?, quotaFloor?}`; first statement is the JSON.parse stringified-args shim (papercut 6d2e0ad, user-approved). Load reads `trip status` (fan-out + phaseMap) AND `trip show` (cabin/window ŌĆö status does NOT carry them); CONTEXT.cabin is the LETTER (Y/W/J/F), mapped from the trip's cabin name at Load and regex-validated before splicing.
- After any non-skipped sweep, one agent re-reads `trip status` and downstream skip decisions use the refreshed phaseMap (never the Load snapshot).
- Every `expand` passes required `--cabin <letter>`; expansion picks the lowest-mileage itinerary flown entirely in that cabin (NoData on none). Booking links key off the API field `link`, not `url`.
- Interpolation allowlist: project/slug/labels/factor-ids/availability-ids/cabin letters, each regex-validated. No jq program strings. One-writer: prefs set*/trip set/trip log at main level only; persist agents write via `trip artifact write` + `trip phase-done`.
- `shortlist` is a click GROUP: `shortlist run <slug> [--gateway]`, `shortlist onward <slug>`. Onward minima are date-keyed and hard-avoid-filtered; empty gateway shortlist ŌåÆ NoData before any HTTP.
- Node >=24: use `node --test 'tests/workflow/*.test.mjs'` (directory form breaks).

## Doctrine (tested by name in cli/tests)
Biases never gate (only hard-avoids + endpoint-veto union filter ŌĆö plus the two feasibility constraints seats/ceiling; veto omitted in gateway mode); `barely` demotes within the band only; classification behind the 2x expansion buffer, truncation at rank; hybrid-absent path inert; compositions never cost-pruned. Factor registry (data/factors.json) is closed data ŌĆö a new factor is a row + collector prompt, never a class hierarchy.

## Hooks
Hooks resolve the CLI path from `__file__` (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unset under `uvx capt-hook run`) and treat `prefs status` exit 1 AND 3 as unconfigured. Trigger on `has_skill` only (capt-hook API version skew across Python 3.12/3.13).
